items.title: Monitoring started: Waldo County Probate Court

page_lines: US Department of State Passports & International Homepage
The Registry of Probate handles matters concerning the probating of wills, appointment of personal representatives, adoption orders, and proceedings.
View the list of items that can be handled at the Register of Probate Office:
Informal and Formal Appointment of Personal Representatives
Termination of parental rights in conjunction with adoption proceedings
Establishment of parental rights in conjunction with adoption proceedings
Child support orders in conjunction with guardianship and determination of parental rights and responsibilities proceedings
Complaints to determine parental rights and responsibilities
Any other matter governed by Statute and Rules of Court

Please note that, effective February 6, 2013, the following payment methods are accepted: local check or cash. VISA, MasterCard, Discover, and American Express debit and credit cards will also be accepted. However, on all credit and debit card transactions, there will be a 2.5% fee charged, with a minimum $1 charge.
